name: Hospital
description: Heals citizens and manages patient records

failureMessages.no_required_tool: The hospital had no way to look up treatments or calculate dosages.
failureMessages.no_search: Without Web Search, the agent relied on outdated training data.
failureMessages.no_calculator: Dosage calculations were off — estimating instead of computing.

name: Library
description: Stores and retrieves knowledge for the city

failureMessages.no_required_tool: The library couldn't answer patron questions — no way to search or process data.
failureMessages.no_search: Rue tried to answer from memory alone and gave confident but wrong answers.
failureMessages.memory_tool_mismatch: Rue found great answers but couldn't connect them across related questions.

failureMessages.no_required_tool: The transit system had no way to plan routes or remember schedules.
failureMessages.no_planner: Routes ran simultaneously instead of being scheduled in order.
failureMessages.no_memory: Axel planned a perfect route but forgot the first half while executing the second.
failureMessages.memory_tool_mismatch: The Planner created steps, but without Memory Bank, step 3 forgot step 1.

name: Security Tower
description: Monitors threats and enforces safety protocols

failureMessages.no_required_tool: The security tower had no way to detect threats or track incidents.
failureMessages.no_alert: Sentry had no way to flag suspicious activity or escalate to humans.
failureMessages.no_memory: Sentry caught each incident but couldn't see the pattern connecting them.
failureMessages.memory_tool_mismatch: Alert System flagged one-off anomalies, but couldn't detect the escalating pattern.
